# Harshit Shrivastav - Complete Portfolio Content

## Overview
Harshit Shrivastav is a Python Developer and Data Science student with expertise in Python, SQL, Machine Learning, Flask, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Linux. This portfolio showcases projects, experience, education, and contact information.

## Personal Statement
I'm a Data Science student with a Commerce background — I love numbers, coding, and economics. Good with Python, SQL, DSA, and tools like Flask, Redis, PostgreSQL, Markdown and WordPress.

Always curious, always learning. I enjoy turning data into something meaningful — and maybe a little impactful. With a unique blend of business acumen and technical skill, I bridge the gap between raw data and real-world decisions.

## Work Experience

### Founder & Developer @ webmy.site (2024 - Present)
- Built a platform for creating modern web presences
- Full-stack development with PHP and MySQL
- Designed system architecture and deployment pipelines

### Open Source Contributor @ Various Projects (2022 - Present)
- Contributed to popular Python open-source projects
- Implemented new features and bug fixes
- Improved documentation and user guides

### Freelance Developer @ Independent (2020 - 2023)
- Developed automation solutions for clients
- Built data pipelines and ETL processes
- Optimized workflows for efficiency

## Education

### BS in Data Science & Applications (2024 - 2028)
Data Science Program
- Specialized in machine learning and statistical analysis
- Advanced Python programming and algorithms
- Big data technologies and distributed systems

### Bachelor of Commerce (2023 - 2026)
Commerce & Business
- Focus on Accounts and Business
- Minor in Mutual Funds
- Minor in Income Tax Return

## Projects

### AI Video Generator
A Python-based AI Agent that can generate learning videos using slides with sound using Microsoft TTS.
**Technologies:** Python, AI, TTS

### Agency Landing Page
A visually appealing landing page for a Service Agency with modern design and smooth interactions.
**Technologies:** HTML, CSS, JavaScript

### Task Management API
RESTful API for task management with JWT authentication and real-time updates.
**Technologies:** REST API, JWT, Python
